Footer

Wave mark + wordmark, link columns, a newsletter signup, social icons and a legal row. Two treatments: dark navy (default) and light (.footer-light).

Dark footer (default)
Oceans View

A bright beachfront resort on the sand at Camps Bay, Cape Town. Sea-view rooms, three pools, a spa, and a slower way to do summer.
